name: Chicken with Apples and Bacon
recipeIngredient: 2 Granny Smith apples, peeled and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook bacon over medium heat until browned and crisp, about 3 minutes. Transfer the cooked bacon to a piece of paper towel using a slotted spoon to drain. Discard all but 2 teaspoons of fat from the pan.
2. Add half of the chicken thighs to the pan and brown them well, about 2 minutes per side. Remove the browned chicken to a plate using a slotted spoon. Repeat with the remaining chicken thighs.
3. Reduce heat to medium-low. Add onions to the pan and cook, scraping up any browned bits from the bottom of the pan until the onions are browned and beginning to soften, about 4 minutes.
4. Add apple juice, apples, mustard, vinegar, thyme, salt, pepper, and reserved bacon to the pan. Cover the pot and reduce heat to low. Simmer gently, stirring occasionally, until the chicken is no longer pink in the center, 20 to 25 minutes.
5. In a small bowl, mix cornstarch with 2 teaspoons water. Stir this mixture into the sauce. Cook until the sauce thickens, about 1 minute.
